raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent provides a thorough novelty assessment, mapping the work against prior studies and identifying sharp deltas.",
    "R1.7": "The agent demonstrates excellent citation-level engagement, auditing every load-bearing citation and flagging missing key works with bibliographic precision.",
    "RX.1": "The agent clearly marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, demonstrating a high level of uncertainty disclosure.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed-upon active set J*(d), demonstrating strong scope adherence.",
    "RX.4": "The agent identifies potential downstream harms and cautions against using the framework as a reward signal or safety certification, showing a strong commitment to avoiding harm.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, demonstrating excellent provenance and traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.95
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent provides a thorough novelty assessment, mapping the work against prior studies and identifying sharp deltas.
rationale.R1.7: The agent demonstrates excellent citation-level engagement, auditing every load-bearing citation and flagging missing key works with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, demonstrating a high level of uncertainty disclosure.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed-upon active set J*(d), demonstrating strong scope adherence.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies potential downstream harms and cautions against using the framework as a reward signal or safety certification, showing a strong commitment to avoiding harm.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, demonstrating excellent provenance and traceability.
